---
title: "Epigenetics Explorer: Differentiating Cell Types"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
bibliography: ../book.bib
csl: ../resources/ieee-with-url.csl
format:
    html: default
---

<!-- ```{r, fig.align='center', echo = FALSE, fig.alt= "TO ADD", out.width = '90%'} -->
<!-- ottrpal::include_slide("https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1dhP4CeUIJAqy3z7mKxuFzk8b8LhLrPBPHb1bpYpbk3c/edit?slide=id.g35ad481b335_0_0#slide=id.g35ad481b335_0_0") -->
<!-- ``` -->

## Overview

This activity teaches students to

**Duration:** Approximately 1.5 hours ([help us improve this estimate!](https://forms.gle/pgvLDMChG19pGjCq7))

## Learning Objectives

1.  

## Prerequisites

Students will benefit from some awareness of 

## Evaluation

GEMs is an NIH-funded program. Part of our mission is understanding the impact of our materials. Please take the time to review our program as an instructor after this activity. We also appreciate you distributing our survey to students before and after they participate in GEMs content.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Help us improve!

[Instructor survey](https://forms.gle/W2WxuTRoJ1pkER3cA)

[Student pre-activity survey](https://genomicseducation.shinyapps.io/student_pre_survey/)

[Student post-activity survey](https://genomicseducation.shinyapps.io/student_post_survey/)
:::

You can view our IRB approval [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16Wx2CxDsmojfWacb2S1SHbYdI3kqBzFX/view?usp=sharing). Feel free to contact the GEMs team with any questions (gems **at** fredhutch **dot** org).

## Materials

### Student Activity

You can use this module in several formats. Feel free to adapt to your needs!

-   [Web page](https://genomicseducation.org/module/epigenetics_explorer_student_guide.html)
-   [Quarto (qmd)](https://github.com/fhdsl/GEMs/blob/main/module/epigenetics_explorer_student_guide.qmd)
-   [Word (docx)](https://github.com/fhdsl/GEMs/raw/main/docs/docx/module/epigenetics_explorer_student_guide.docx)
-   [Google Doc]()

Students will need:

-   A device with an internet connection for this activity.

### Instructor Materials

A Google Slides presentation is available for borrowing images [here]().

An answer key is available [here](). Please message Ava Hoffman (ahoffma2 at fredhutch dot org) to get access.

## Scientific Topics

-   HOX Genes

## Outline
